summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Fırat Optik luxury eyewear website. All core functionality working perfectly including homepage, hero slider, brand navigation, admin panel, and product management.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing Description for DialogContent (cosmetic only)

passed_tests: Backend API: Admin login with admin/firatoptik2024
Backend API: GET /api/brands returns 12 brands
Backend API: GET /api/brands/gucci returns brand details with products
Backend API: GET /api/settings returns contact information
Backend API: All CRUD operations for brands and products
Frontend: Loading screen with FIRAT OPTİK text
Frontend: Hero slider with Turkish text 'Görüşünüz, stilinizin en keskin hali'
Frontend: Hero slider navigation dots and auto-rotation
Frontend: Brand marquee infinite scroll
Frontend: 12 editorial brand blocks from API
Frontend: Brand block navigation to /marka/dior
Frontend: Brand detail page with 'Koleksiyon Hazırlanıyor' message
Frontend: Back to home navigation
Frontend: Technical Excellence section
Frontend: Contact footer with phone, WhatsApp, email, address
Frontend: Navbar with FIRAT OPTİK logo and navigation links
Admin Panel: Login at /admin/giris
Admin Panel: Dashboard with brands (12) and products tables
Admin Panel: Add new product via dialog form
Admin Panel: Edit brand via dialog form
Integration: Product added via admin shows on brand page
